# Artifacts Management

Owns the lifecycle of intermediate per-stage artifact files (naming,
provenance, retention) — distinct from `../documentation.agent.md`'s
final-package compilation role.

| File | Scope |
| :--- | :--- |
| `artifact-provenance-specialist.agent.md` | Provenance record shape (run/stage/provider/model/path/timestamp) |

Condensed from `OPEN_AI_DEV_WEEK_HACKATHON/INVESTIGATE.md` §3.2.
